appsync.datasource.eventbridgeconfig.Cfn: The data source. This can be an API destination, resource, or AWS service.

appsync.datasource.eventbridgeconfig.Eve.Description: The event bus pipeline's ARN. For more information about event buses, see [EventBridge event buses](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eb-event-bus.html).
